input: Run api designer on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected api designer output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the api designer workflow

input: Apply api designer to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive api designer analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to api designer

input: Run api designer but I have no files or documentation yet
expected_behavior: Skill handles gracefully — requests minimum viable input or produces gap analysis

input: Apply api designer but requirements contradict each other
